tasks.title: Fix/verify test suite passes
tasks.notes: turso dialect fails with local file URLs in drizzle-kit push. Fixed by using --dialect sqlite with explicit params in global-setup.ts. 3 test files, 6 tests pass.

tasks.title: Add CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions)
tasks.notes: Added .github/workflows/ci.yml — lint + typecheck (quality job) → test + coverage (test job) on push/PR to main. Plan: progress/features/ci-pipeline.md

tasks.title: Plan sprint v0.2.0 with gap analysis tasks
tasks.notes: Gap analysis of project vs harness planning docs. Identified 13 improvements, added as v0.2.0 tasks.

tasks.title: Add scripts/init.sh startup script
tasks.notes: Created scripts/init.sh — installs deps, creates .env, pushes schema, starts Redis, runs tests. Added 'init' script to package.json. Plan: progress/features/init-script.md

tasks.title: Automate quality scores measurement
tasks.notes: Created scripts/update-quality.ts — runs vitest --coverage, parses json-summary, counts biome violations per layer. Added 'quality' script to package.json. Plan: progress/features/quality-scores-automation.md

tasks.title: Add auth e2e tests
tasks.notes: Added 6 auth tests: sign-up, duplicate rejection, sign-in, wrong password, session with/without cookie. Fixed auth provider to pass schema to drizzle adapter. Plan: progress/features/auth-e2e-tests.md

tasks.title: Add service unit tests (ai.ts)
tasks.notes: Added 3 unit tests for generateText: text response, custom maxTokens, non-text response. Used vi.hoisted() for mock SDK constructor.

tasks.title: Document retry/loop bounding policy
tasks.notes: Created .claude/rules/retry-policy.md with CI retry limits, agent self-repair bounds, test-fix cycle rules, and escalation criteria.

tasks.title: Add author_accounts CRUD (full 6-layer flow)
tasks.notes: Full 6-layer CRUD: types, schema, repo, service, routes. 5 REST endpoints with OpenAPI. 12 e2e tests + 6 unit tests. Plan: progress/features/author-accounts.md

tasks.title: Adopt worktree isolation model (ADR)
tasks.notes: Created ADR-006: worktree isolation for parallel tasks. Recommends git worktrees via Claude Code's built-in support.

tasks.title: Add context management rules
tasks.notes: Created .claude/rules/context.md with context flooding prevention, output offloading, long session hygiene, and progressive disclosure guidelines.

tasks.title: Add BullMQ worker smoke test
tasks.notes: Created minimal worker src/services/worker.ts (ping job handler) + integration test tests/integration/worker.test.ts (2 tests: ping success, unknown type). Uses QueueEvents for job completion tracking.

tasks.title: Set up harness effectiveness metrics
tasks.notes: Created scripts/update-harness-metrics.ts — computes task success rate, first-pass CI success, rework rate, avg duration from progress + git history. Output: docs/quality/harness-metrics.json.

tasks.title: Add contents CRUD (full 6-layer flow)
tasks.notes: Content records across platforms (posts, articles, videos, etc.). FK to author_accounts + self-referencing parent_id for threads. Plan: progress/features/contents.md

known_issues: drizzle-kit push may fail in vitest global-setup.ts — needs diagnosis (TASK-006)
tech_debt: BullMQ queue configured but no workers exist
